steps.title: Identify the probability formula and outcomes
steps.content:
We use the probability formula, where:
  • Favorable outcomes (blank tiles) = 8
  • Total outcomes (all tiles) = 40

steps.title: Calculate the probability
steps.content:
Apply the formula with our values:
$$P(\text{blank tile}) = \frac{8}{40}$$
Simplify by dividing both numerator and denominator by 8:
$$\frac{8}{40} = \frac{1}{5}$$
Converting to decimal form: $0.2$

The answer is $\frac{1}{5}$ or $0.2$
The answer is 0.2,1/5.
